title: B001: Implement common types and pure function packages
summary: Review of a single commit (c8c1bb6) that adds one new test to config_test.go addressing external reviewer feedback. The test verifies the documented no-copy contract of InjectOsloPolicyConfig when policyFilePath is empty, using reflect.ValueOf().Pointer() for map reference-identity assertion. All tests pass (20 tests), go vet and golangci-lint clean, 100% coverage on the config package. The change is minimal, correct, and well-motivated.

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases are covered (nil, empty, boundary)
Tests are independent (no shared mutable state)
Assertions are specific (exact values, not just 'no error')

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (Gomega dot-import, NewGomegaWithT)
License header and Feature: CC-0004 present
No dead code or commented-out code
Clear naming and intention-revealing test name

security_checklist.item: No security concerns (pure function tests only)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
No scope creep beyond external review feedback
